headline: Carnival (CCL) Valuation Check After FTSE Index Removal And Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Carnival (CCL) has been removed from several key FTSE indices, including the FTSE 100, FTSE 250, FTSE 350 and FTSE All Share. This reshuffle can prompt forced trading by index linked investors. See our latest analysis for Carnival. The index removals come after a period of weaker share price momentum, with Carnival’s 1 day, 7 day, 30 day, 90 day and year to date share price returns all in decline, even as the 1 year and 3 year total shareholder returns remain positive and the 5 year total...
